title: Amtech F1212 82mm (3.2") Core drill
features: DURABLE: This heavy duty 82mm (3.2") core drill is made from hardened and tempered steel and has a tungsten carbide tip for durability
VERSATILE: Supplied with an SDS/ SDS+ shank with an 8mm pilot drill, it is ideal for drilling brick and blocks for ventilation or waste drainage pipes, etc
SIZE CAPACITY: 82 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x 82mm Core drill See more
